latin: Aut vivere incipe aut mori incipe. in carcere duo sunt genera hominum — qui sperant et qui desistunt. ego sperare elegi.

questions.prompt: What choice does the speaker present?
questions.target: Get busy living or get busy dying
choices: Get busy living or get busy dying

translation: Either get busy living or get busy dying. In prison there are two kinds of people — those who hope and those who give up. I chose to hope.
